subcodes.first_line: O thou who art bound with chains and fetters in the path of God! The letter thou didst write to Jinab-i-Ismu'llah [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تسلسل بسلاسل و تقید بالکبول فی سبیل الله مراسله که بجناب اسم الله مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Hands of the Cause
